caption:
Save this for your next date! 💗

Here’s what we love about Mamounia Lounge in DIFC:
💗 Whimsical atmosphere
🍴 Middle Eastern food. There’s a great selection of mezze to share. Mains are in generous servings. 
👩‍🍳 Attentive service 
💸 Approximate spend for two: 300 AED
